heading: Periodic briefings from Bureau of Intelligence and Research
label: 2680–4 Periodic briefings from Bureau of Intelligence and Research
notes: DefinitionsFor definitions of “Secretary” and “Appropriate Congressional Committees” as used in this section, see , set out as a note under .section 5002 of Pub. L. 119–60section 2651 of this title

children.text: any topic requested by one or more of the appropriate congressional committees;
any topic of current importance to the national security of the United States; and
any other topic the Secretary considers necessary.

children.heading: Location
children.label: b Location
children.text: The briefings required under subsection (a) shall be held at a secure facility that is suitable for review of information that is classified at the level of “Top Secret/SCI”.

children.heading: No limitation on other briefings
children.label: c No limitation on other briefings
children.text: Any briefings pursuant to subsection (a) shall be in addition to any briefings provided to the appropriate congressional committees, the Select Committee on Intelligence of the Senate, and the Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence of the House of Representatives. Nothing in this section shall be construed to limit the provision of any other briefings to the committees described in this subsection.
